revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-445

Alternative term: Epoxy resin, Paint

Paint based on a synthetic resin, supplied in a two pack form, a hardener having to be mixed with the resin at the time of application to produce a set.

{{IALAFooter}}
